title: stenactis philadelphica
intro: Stenactis philadelphica, also known as Philly fleabane or Stenactis, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenactis philadelphica include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
